user: The user wants to cancel any unshipped orders, return a delivered watch, and know the total refund.
assistant: The assistant authenticates the user via name and zip, retrieves the account, and checks all three orders.
assistant: The assistant identifies two pending orders that can be canceled and one delivered order containing the Smart Watch, then the user confirms canceling both pending orders and returning the Smart Watch from order #W9389413.
assistant: The assistant has already canceled the two pending orders and now asks for confirmation details before processing the Smart Watch return.

candidate_answers.text: Got it. I’ll total the canceled orders and the Smart Watch return so I can confirm the refund amount before we finish processing the return to your PayPal account.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
